JScience 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.jscience.natural.biology
  2. Individual

Uses of Class
org.jscience.natural.biology.Individual

Packages that use Individual
Package
Description
org.jscience.natural.biology
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.ecology
 
org.jscience.natural.biology.genealogy
Biological taxonomy, genetics, and physiological modeling.
org.jscience.natural.earth
 
org.jscience.natural.methodology.experiment
Core functionality for the org.jscience.core.methodology.experiment package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.jscience.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.jscience.social.economics.resources
Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
org.jscience.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.jscience.social.law
Provides the org.jscience.social.law module.
org.jscience.social.linguistics
Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.
org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation
Core functionality for the org.jscience.social.medicine.consultation package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.social.politics
Provides the org.jscience.social.politics module.
org.jscience.social.psychology
Provides the org.jscience.social.psychology module.
org.jscience.social.psychology.social
Provides the org.jscience.social.psychology.social module.
org.jscience.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<Individual>
    LineageGraph.getDescendants(Individual individual)
    Finds all descendants of an individual in this graph using Depth-First Search.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    LineageGraph.addLink(Individual from, Individual to)
    Adds a lineage link (e.g., Parent to Child, Predecessor to Successor).
    Set<Individual>
    LineageGraph.getDescendants(Individual individual)
    Finds all descendants of an individual in this graph using Depth-First Search.

    Adds an individual as an economic agent participating in this situation.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Lawyer.addClient(Individual individual)
    Adds a new client to the lawyer's representation.

    LawSuitSituation.addDefendant(Individual individual)
    Adds a defendant to the lawsuit.

    LawSuitSituation.addJudge(Individual individual, Administration administration)
    Adds a judge to the lawsuit.

    Adds a jury member to the lawsuit.

    Adds a lawyer to the lawsuit.
    void
    LawSuitSituation.addPlaintiff(Individual individual)
    Adds a plaintiff to the lawsuit.
    void
    LawSuitSituation.addProsecutor(Individual individual, Administration administration)
    Adds a prosecutor to the lawsuit.
    void
    StreetSituation.addResponsibleIndividual(Individual individual)
    Adds an individual playing the role of a responsible individual in this situation.
    void
    LawSuitSituation.addWitness(Individual individual)
    Adds a witness to the lawsuit.
    void
    Lawyer.removeClient(Individual individual)
    Removes a client from the lawyer's representation.

    Constructor

    Creates a new Judge object with the default "Judge" title.

    Creates a new Lawyer object with the default function "Lawyer".

    Creates a new Plaintiff role for an individual.
     
    Prosecutor(Individual individual, LawSuitSituation lawSuitSituation, String function, Administration administration)
    Creates a new Prosecutor with a specific function.
     
    Prosecutor(Individual individual, LawSuitSituation lawSuitSituation, Administration administration)
    Creates a new Prosecutor with the default title "Prosecutor".

    Creates a new ResponsibleIndividual for a given person in a specific legal context.
     
    Witness(Individual individual, LawSuitSituation lawSuitSituation)
    Creates a new Witness role for an individual.

    Methods in org.jscience.social.politics that return types with arguments of type Individual
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<Individual>
    City.getLeaders()
    Returns an unmodifiable view of the city's current leaders.
    Set<Individual>
    Settlement.getLeaders()
    Returns an unmodifiable set of the settlement's leaders (e.g., chiefs, experts).
    Methods in org.jscience.social.politics with parameters of type Individual
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Candidate
    Election.addCandidate(Individual individual, String office)
    Registers an individual as a candidate in this election.
    void
    CivilSituation.addCitizen(Individual individual)
    Adds an individual to the civil situation as a citizen.
    void
    City.addLeader(Individual leader)
    Adds an individual to the city's leadership team.
    void
    Settlement.addLeader(Individual leader)
    Adds an individual to the leadership of the settlement.
    Voter
    Election.addVoter(Individual individual)
    Registers an individual as a voter in this election.
    void
    City.removeLeader(Individual leader)
    Removes an individual from the city's leadership.
    void
    Settlement.removeLeader(Individual leader)
    Removes an individual from leadership.

  • Uses of Individual in org.jscience.social.psychology.social

    Subclasses with type arguments of type Individual in org.jscience.social.psychology.social
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Crowd
    Represents a transient gathering of individuals (a crowd) sharing a common physical proximity and motive, but lacking the structured relations found in a Group.
    class 
    Group
    Represents a group of individuals from a psychological and social perspective.
